info.description:
AnyChat instant messaging system gateway API service, providing HTTP interfaces for user authentication, user management, and other functions.
All endpoints requiring authentication must include Authorization: Bearer <token> in the Header.
info.title: AnyChat Gateway API

post.description: admin login with username and password, returns access token

get.description: admin search/list system users

post.description: User login via account and password
User logout, invalidate token for current device
User changes login password
User forgets password, reset via verification code
Use refresh token to get new access token
User registers new account via phone or email
Send SMS/email verification code for registration, password recovery or binding scenarios

get.description: Get current user's call history

post.description: Initiate audio/video call to specified user, returns Calling Room name and JWT Token

get.description: Get detailed info of specified call session

post.description: Caller or callee ends the call
Callee accepts call invitation, returns Calling Room name and JWT Token
Callee rejects call invitation

get.description: Get list of currently active meeting rooms

post.description: Create new audio/video meeting room, returns meeting info and Calling Token

get.description: Get detailed info of specified meeting room

post.description: Creator ends meeting room, all participants will be removed after room closes
Join specified meeting room, returns Calling Token

get.description: Get current user's conversation list, supports incremental sync (via updatedBefore parameter)

parameters.description: Unix timestamp, only return conversations updated before this time (incremental sync)
parameters.name: updatedBefore

get.description: Get total unread message count for all conversations of current user (muted conversations excluded)
Get details of specified conversation

delete.description: Delete specified conversation (doesn't affect messages, only removes from conversation list)

put.description: Set conversation auto delete duration, 0 means cancel
Set conversation burn after reading duration, 0 means cancel

get.description: Query messages after an anchor_message_id in a conversation
Query messages before and after anchor_message_id in one request
Query messages before an anchor_message_id in a conversation
Query first unread message anchor, optionally returning context windows

parameters.description: messages before anchor when with_context=true (default 20, max 100)
parameters.name: before

parameters.description: messages after anchor when with_context=true (default 20, max 100)
parameters.name: after

post.description: Used in scrolling list scenarios, batch report visible message IDs and advance conversation read cursor

get.description: Return last read sequence for members in conversation
Get latest message sequence in conversation
Query unread message count for current user in specified conversation

put.description: Enable or disable mute for specified conversation

post.description: Clear unread count for specified conversation and advance message read cursor to latest sequence

get.description: Paginate list of current user's files, supports filtering by type

post.description: Generate presigned upload URL, client uses this URL to upload directly to MinIO

get.description: Get file metadata info

post.description: After client finishes upload, notify server to activate file

get.description: Generate presigned download URL, client uses this URL to download directly from MinIO
Get all friends of current user, supports incremental sync
Get current user's blacklist

post.description: Add specified user to blacklist

get.description: Get friend request list by numeric request_type

post.description: Send friend request to specified user

put.description: Handle friend request with numeric action
Update remark name for specified friend

get.description: Get all groups the current user has joined

post.description: Create a new group, requires at least 2 members (including creator)
Join group via QR code token, join directly or submit request based on group settings

get.description: Get group name, avatar, member count and join verification via QR code token

400.description: invalid parameter or QR code expired

get.description: Get detailed info of specified group

put.description: Update group name, avatar, announcement etc (requires admin permission)

post.description: Request to join specified group

get.description: Get members of specified group, supports pagination

post.description: Invite users to join group

delete.description: Remove member from group (requires admin permission)

put.description: Set or remove group admin (owner only)
Set your nickname in the group

get.description: Get current valid group QR code, auto create/renew if not exists or expiring soon (all members)

post.description: Refresh group QR code, invalidate old one and generate new one (owner/admin only)
Quit specified group

put.description: Set a remark for the group that only you can see, pass empty string to clear

get.description: Get join requests for specified group (requires admin permission)

put.description: Accept or reject join request (requires admin permission)

post.description: Transfer group owner to another member (owner only)
Send conversation message via HTTP (supports idempotent local_id)
Client batch reports message read trigger events, server starts burn timer accordingly
post.summary: burn after reading read trigger acknowledgment

post.description: Recall specified message, can only recall own messages within 2 minutes

get.description: Search messages by keyword and conversation scope
Get single message by message ID

delete.description: Delete specified message, can only delete own messages

post.description: Called when client logs in or resumes from background. Returns friends, groups, conversation changes since lastSyncTime, and offline messages for each conversation. lastSyncTime=0 means full sync.
Pull offline messages based on the latest known sequence number for each conversation

get.description: Get detailed profile of currently logged in user

put.description: Update personal profile of currently logged in user

post.description: Bind email for currently logged in user
Change bound email for currently logged in user
Bind phone number for currently logged in user
Change bound phone number for currently logged in user
Update device push notification token

get.description: Get current user's preference settings
Search users by keyword (supports nickname, phone, user ID)
Get public info of specified user

Client maintains long connection via WebSocket to receive real-time notifications and message pushes. Since WebSocket protocol doesn't support custom headers, JWT token is passed via URL query parameter.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

display_name.description: Remark takes priority, falls back to Name

message.example: Hello, I would like to join the group
Hello, I would like to join
